briefing.ai_hardware: Arm launched a 136-core AGI CPU for data centers, claiming over 2x performance per rack vs x86; SK Telecom pivots to AI data centers.
briefing.cybersecurity: Tenable unveiled Hexa AI for autonomous exposure management; Trend Micro rebranded to TrendAI™ to focus on AI-compute layer security.
briefing.openai: OpenAI discontinues Sora app, pivoting to B2B business tools; funding hits $120B valuation milestone.
briefing.market_sentiment: Global AI infrastructure spending projected to hit $500B+ in 2026; industry focus shifts to agentic AI workloads and runtime security guardrails.
briefing.update_notes: Synchronized with major industry pivots and new product launches from March 25, 2026.
